overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's urban downtown at night. The scene features neon-lit commercial streets, elevated highways, street vendors, and moderate pedestrian traffic under a clear night sky with artificial neon lighting dominating the cyberpunk environment.

segments.scene_description: The character begins at street level near a green vending machine, then descends concrete stairs into a lower plaza area. A 24/7 convenience store with neon signage becomes visible ahead, while palm trees line the plaza. The environment is semi-covered with artificial lighting illuminating the scene.

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the 24/7 convenience store through a paved plaza area. A large skull mural becomes visible on a red wall to the right, while pedestrians move through the space. The convenience store shifts to the left as the character progresses through the semi-covered plaza.

segments.scene_description: The character moves along a street lined with yellow railings, passing a food cart with a rainbow umbrella on the left. The environment transitions from the plaza to a more open street as the character approaches an intersection with visible crosswalk markings ahead.

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide intersection using the yellow-striped crosswalk, with a black car passing in the distance. After crossing, the character turns left onto a sidewalk dominated by large digital billboards and neon-lit commercial buildings under the elevated highway structure.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sidewalk covered by the massive concrete overpass structure, entering a darker area illuminated by neon storefront signs. The environment shifts from the open intersection to a more enclosed urban corridor with graffiti-covered walls and glowing advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunken urban plaza into a vibrant, open commercial street. It begins at street level near a green vending machine, descending concrete stairs into a semi-covered plaza where neon signage for a 24/7 convenience store and lining palm trees emerge. As the character progresses, the convenience store shifts to the left and the space opens up to reveal a large skull mural on a red wall amidst a flow of pedestrians. The scene then transitions from the enclosed plaza toward a more open thoroughfare, passing a food cart with a rainbow umbrella and yellow railings. Finally, the camera moves forward along the paved path, approaching a city intersection marked by visible crosswalks under the glow of artificial lights.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, brightly lit city intersection into a more enclosed and shadowed urban corridor. It begins with the character crossing a wide, yellow-striped crosswalk as a black car passes in the distance, before turning left onto a sidewalk dominated by towering digital billboards. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts beneath the massive concrete structure of an elevated highway, transitioning from the open air into a sheltered space. The scene then narrows into a darker pedestrian path where the lighting changes from broad city glows to the concentrated flicker of neon storefront signs and graffiti-covered walls.
